---
title: "Simulation_x"
author: "Ziyi Wang"
date: "2025-08-20"
output:
  html_document: 
    theme: united
    toc: yes
    toc_float:
      collapsed: yes
    smooth_scroll: yes
    code_folding: "hide"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(knitr)
opts_chunk$set(collapse=TRUE, fig.align='center', tidy=TRUE, tidy.opts=list(blank=TRUE, width.cutoff=80), warning=FALSE,message=FALSE,cache=F)
library(locfdr)
library(admix)
library(mvtnorm)
library(mixtools)
library(devtools)
library(KScorrect)
library(mclust)
library(adaptMT)
library(AdaPTGMM)
library(splines2)
library(splines)
library(IHW)
library(FDRreg)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
require(OrderShapeEM)
library(chai)

setwd("C:/Users/zwang26/OneDrive - UTHealth Houston/conditionalGaussian")
# source("ConditionalGaussianlFDR_defined_functions_playing.R")
# source("chai.R")


# summary_by_aq <- readRDS("C:/Users/zwang26/OneDrive - UTHealth Houston/conditionalGaussian/chai_env/simX_summary_diff_q.rds")
# 
# results_all <- readRDS("C:/Users/zwang26/OneDrive - UTHealth Houston/conditionalGaussian/chai_env/simX_all_results_diff_q.rds")

```


# Simulation Setting

Simulation setting:

- Under Null (n0 = 950):
$$ z_{H0} \sim \mathcal{N}(0, 1) $$
$$ x1_{H0} \sim \mathcal{N}(5, 1) $$
$$ x2_{H0} \sim \mathcal{N}(1, 1) $$

- Under Alternative 1 (n1 = 25):
$$ z_{H1_1} \sim \mathcal{N}(2, 0.5) $$
$$ x1_{H1_1} \sim \mathcal{N}(4, 1)  $$
$$ x2_{H1_1} \sim \mathcal{N}(2, 1)  $$
- Under Alternative 2 (n2 = 25):
$$ z_{H1_2} \sim \mathcal{N}(3, 0.5) $$
$$ x1_{H1_2} \sim \mathcal{N}(3, 1)  $$
$$ x2_{H1_2} \sim \mathcal{N}(3, 1)  $$


```{r}
set.seed(123)
n = 1000
n0 <- 950
n1 <- 25

z0 <- rnorm(n0, mean = 0, sd = 1)
x0 <- rnorm(n0, mean = 5, sd = 1)
y0 <- rnorm(n0, mean = 1, sd = 1)

z1 <- rnorm(n1, mean = 2, sd = 0.5)
x1 <- rnorm(n1, mean = 4, sd = 1)
y1 <- rnorm(n1, mean = 2, sd = 1)

z2 <- rnorm(n1, mean = 3, sd = 0.5)
x2 <- rnorm(n1, mean = 3, sd = 1)
y2 <- rnorm(n1, mean = 3, sd = 1)

z <- c(z0, z1, z2)
x <- c(x0, x1, x2)
y <- c(y0, y1, y2)

X <- cbind(x, y)

# p <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(z)))
p <- pnorm(z, lower.tail = FALSE)


gt_x <- seq((n0+1), n)    
length(gt_x)            # 50

true_labels <- c(rep('Null', n0), rep('Signal', n - n0))

```


# Plot of z and X

```{r}
df <- data.frame(z = z, x1 = x, x2 = y, p = p)

# z
ggplot(df, aes(x=z)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..), binwidth=0.25, color="black", fill="lightblue") +
  geom_density() +
  stat_function(fun=dnorm, args=list(mean=0, sd=1), linetype="dashed") +
  labs(title="Histogram of z-value with N(0,1)", x="z", y="Density") +
  theme_minimal()

# x1
ggplot(df, aes(x = x1)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = ..density..), bins = 40, color = "black", fill = "lightblue") +
  geom_density() +
  labs(
    title = paste0("Histogram of x1"),
    x = "x1", y = "Density"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

# x2
ggplot(df, aes(x = x2)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = ..density..), bins = 40, color = "black", fill = "lightblue") +
  geom_density() +
  labs(
    title = paste0("Histogram of x2"),
    x = "x2", y = "Density"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```


# Fit Model

## CHAI
```{r}
set.seed(123)
sim_x <- chai(z, X, M = 100)
select <- lFDRselect(sim_x, q = 0.05)
performance(gt_x, select, z = sim_x$z, 
            bh_level = 0.05, one.sided = TRUE)[c(4,1,2)]
# 31, 0.0323, 0.6
```

## Adapt

```{r}
alphas <- seq(0.01, 0.1, by = 0.01)
x <- data.frame(X)

formula_ns <- list("~ns(x, df = 2) + ns(y, df = 2)", 
                   "~ns(x, df = 4) + ns(y, df = 4)", 
                   "~ns(x, df = 6) + ns(y, df = 6)")

```

### GMM, input with z 

```{r}
res_x.gmm_ns_z <- adapt_gmm(x, z = z, alphas=alphas, 
                            beta_formulas = formula_ns, testing = "one_sided")
performance(gt_x, res_x.gmm_ns_z$rejs[5][[1]], z = z, bh_level = 0.05, one.sided = TRUE)[c(4,1,2)]
# 19, 0.0526, 0.36
```

### GMM, input with p

```{r}
# p <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(z)))
p <- pnorm(z, lower.tail = FALSE)

res_x.gmm_ns_p <- adapt_gmm(x, pvals = p, alphas=alphas, 
                            beta_formulas = formula_ns, testing = "one_sided")
performance(gt_x, res_x.gmm_ns_p$rejs[5][[1]], z = z, bh_level = 0.05, one.sided = TRUE)[c(4,1,2)]
# 27, 0.037, 0.52
```


## Adapt-GLM

```{r}
res_x.glm_ns <- adapt_glm(x, pvals=p,  alphas=alphas,
                          pi_formulas = formula_ns, mu_formulas = formula_ns)

performance(gt_x, res_x.glm_ns$rejs[5][[1]], z = z, bh_level = 0.05, one.sided = TRUE)[c(4,1,2)]
# 45, 0.1333, 0.78
performance(gt_x, res_x.glm_ns$rejs[10][[1]], z = z, bh_level = 0.1, one.sided = TRUE)[c(4,1,2)]
# 45, 0.1333, 0.78
```

## FDRreg

```{r}
set.seed(123)
fdr_x <- FDRreg(z, X, nulltype='theoretical')
length(which(fdr_x$FDR <= 0.05))
performance(gt_x, which(fdr_x$FDR <= 0.05), z = z, bh_level = 0.05, one.sided = TRUE)[c(4,1,2)]
# 16, 0, 0.32

```

## OrderShapeEM

```{r}
require(OrderShapeEM)
res_x.orderfdr_1 <- OrderShapeEM(pvals = as.vector(p), order.var = as.vector(X[,1]), 
                               OrderShapeEM.control(trace = TRUE))
sum(res_x.orderfdr_1$fdr <= 0.05)
# 30
res_x.orderfdr_2 <- OrderShapeEM(pvals = as.vector(p), order.var = as.vector(X[,2]), 
                               OrderShapeEM.control(trace = TRUE))
sum(res_x.orderfdr_2$fdr <= 0.05)
# 0
# performance(gt_z, which(res_x.orderfdr_2$fdr <= 0.05), z = z, bh_level = 0.05, one.sided = TRUE)[c(4,1,2)]

```


# Repeating
```{r}
set.seed(1)
library(splines)


# Initialize
seeds <- sample(1:10000, 99)
seeds <- c(seeds, 123)
results_list <- list()

q_grid <- seq(0.01, 0.1, by = 0.01)
alphas <- q_grid
  
for (s in seq_along(seeds)) {
  set.seed(seeds[s])

  n = 1000
  n0 <- 950
  n1 <- 25

  z0 <- rnorm(n0, mean = 0, sd = 1)
  x0 <- rnorm(n0, mean = 5, sd = 1)
  y0 <- rnorm(n0, mean = 1, sd = 1)
  
  z1 <- rnorm(n1, mean = 2, sd = 0.5)
  x1 <- rnorm(n1, mean = 4, sd = 1)
  y1 <- rnorm(n1, mean = 2, sd = 1)
  
  z2 <- rnorm(n1, mean = 3, sd = 0.5)
  x2 <- rnorm(n1, mean = 3, sd = 1)
  y2 <- rnorm(n1, mean = 3, sd = 1)
  
  z <- c(z0, z1, z2)
  x <- c(x0, x1, x2)
  y <- c(y0, y1, y2)
  
  X <- cbind(x, y)

  gt <- seq((n0+1), n) # Ground truth for alternative

  # Common values
  x_df <- data.frame(X)
  formula_ns <- list("~ns(x, df = 2) + ns(y, df = 2)", 
                     "~ns(x, df = 4) + ns(y, df = 4)",
                     "~ns(x, df = 6) + ns(y, df = 6)")
  p <- pnorm(z, lower.tail = FALSE)
  # p <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(z)))

  # Apply models and collect performance
  perf_a <- data.frame(
    Seed    = integer(),
    q       = numeric(),
    Method  = character(),
    Selected  = numeric(),
    FDP       = numeric(),
    Power     = numeric(),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  # # 1. conditionalGaussianlFDR
  # res <- conditionalGaussianlFDR_null_z_autoK(z, X, K = 2:6, q = 0.05)
  # p1_1 <- performance(gt, res$selected, z = res$input_z, bh_level = 0.05, one.sided = FALSE)
  # perf[nrow(perf)+1,] <- c(seeds[s], "conditionalGaussianlFDR", p1_1[c(4,1,2)])
  # 
  # res <- conditionalGaussianlFDR_null_z_autoK(z, X, K = 2:6, q = 0.05, max_lFDR = 0.2)
  # p1_2 <- performance(gt, res$selected, z = res$input_z, bh_level = 0.05, one.sided = FALSE)
  # perf[nrow(perf)+1,] <- c(seeds[s], "conditionalGaussianlFDR_cut", p1_2[c(4,1,2)])

  # 2. CHAI
  res_chai <- chai(z, X, M = 100)
  for (qq in seq_along(q_grid)) {
    select <- lFDRselect(res_chai, q = q_grid[qq])
    p2  <- performance(gt, select, z = res_chai$z,
                       bh_level = q_grid[qq], one.sided = TRUE)
    # chai
    perf_a[nrow(perf_a)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], q_grid[qq], "chai", p2[[4]], p2[[1]], p2[[2]])
    # BH
    perf_a[nrow(perf_a)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], q_grid[qq], "BH",   p2[[13]], p2[[8]], p2[[9]])
  }

  # 3. adapt_gmm_z
  res_gmm_z <- adapt_gmm(x_df, z = z, alphas = alphas,
                         beta_formulas = formula_ns, testing = "one_sided")
  
  for (qq in seq_along(q_grid)) {
    # idx <- match(qq, alphas)  # 0.05 -> 5, 0.06 -> 6, ..., 0.10 -> 10
    p3  <- performance(gt, res_gmm_z$rejs[[qq]], z = z,
                       bh_level = q_grid[qq], one.sided = TRUE)
    perf_a[nrow(perf_a)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], q_grid[qq], "adapt_gmm_z", p3[[4]], p3[[1]], p3[[2]])
  }
  
  # 4. adapt_gmm_p
  res_gmm_p <- adapt_gmm(x_df, pvals = p, alphas = alphas,
                           beta_formulas = formula_ns, testing = "one_sided")
  for (qq in seq_along(q_grid)) {
    # idx <- match(qq, alphas)
    p4  <- performance(gt, res_gmm_p$rejs[[qq]], z = z,
                       bh_level = q_grid[qq], one.sided = TRUE)
    perf_a[nrow(perf_a)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], q_grid[qq], "adapt_gmm_p", p4[[4]], p4[[1]], p4[[2]])
  }

  # 5. adapt_glm
  res_glm <- adapt_glm(x_df, pvals = p, alphas = alphas,
                         pi_formulas = formula_ns, mu_formulas = formula_ns)
  empty <- is.null(res_glm) || (!is.list(res_glm$rejs))
  for (qq in seq_along(q_grid)) {
    if (!empty && lengths(res_glm$rejs)[qq] > 0L){
     p5 <- performance(gt, res_glm$rejs[[qq]], z = z,
                        bh_level = q_grid[qq], one.sided = TRUE)
     perf_a[nrow(perf_a)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], q_grid[qq], "adapt_glm", p5[[4]], p5[[1]], p5[[2]])
     
    } else {
      perf_a[nrow(perf_a)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], q_grid[qq], "adapt_glm", 0, NA, NA)
    }
  }

  # 6. OrderShapeEM
  # First x
  tryCatch({
    res_osem <- OrderShapeEM(pvals = p, order.var = X[,1],
                             OrderShapeEM.control(trace = FALSE))
    for (qq in seq_along(q_grid)) {
      p6 <- performance(gt, which(res_osem$fdr <= q_grid[qq]), z = z,
                        bh_level = q_grid[qq], one.sided = TRUE)
      perf_a[nrow(perf_a)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], q_grid[qq], "OrderShapeEM_x1", p6[[4]], p6[[1]], p6[[2]])
    }
  }, error = function(e) {
    message(paste("OrderShapeEM failed at seed", seeds[s], ":", e$message))
    for (qq in seq_along(q_grid)) {
      perf_a[nrow(perf_a)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], q_grid[qq], "OrderShapeEM_x1", NA, NA, NA)
    }
  })
    
  
  # Second x
  tryCatch({
    res_osem <- OrderShapeEM(pvals = p, order.var = X[,2],
                             OrderShapeEM.control(trace = FALSE))
    for (qq in seq_along(q_grid)) {
      p6 <- performance(gt, which(res_osem$fdr <= q_grid[qq]), z = z,
                        bh_level = q_grid[qq], one.sided = TRUE)
      perf_a[nrow(perf_a)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], q_grid[qq], "OrderShapeEM_x2", p6[[4]], p6[[1]], p6[[2]])
    }
  }, error = function(e) {
    message(paste("OrderShapeEM failed at seed", seeds[s], ":", e$message))
    for (qq in seq_along(q_grid)) {
      perf_a[nrow(perf_a)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], q_grid[qq], "OrderShapeEM_x2", NA, NA, NA)
    }
  })


  # 7. FDRreg
  res_fdrreg <- FDRreg(z, as.matrix(X), nulltype = "theoretical")
  for (qq in seq_along(q_grid)) {
    p7 <- performance(gt, which(res_fdrreg$FDR <= q_grid[qq]), z = z,
                      bh_level = q_grid[qq], one.sided = TRUE)
    perf_a[nrow(perf_a)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], q_grid[qq], "FDRreg", p7[[4]], p7[[1]], p7[[2]])
  }
  
  # 8. IHW
  # First x
  for (qq in seq_along(q_grid)) {
    res_ihw_1 <- ihw(pvalues = p, covariates = X[,1], alpha = q_grid[qq], nbins = 5)
    p8_1 <- performance(gt, which(adj_pvalues(res_ihw_1) <= q_grid[qq]), z = z, bh_level = q_grid[qq], one.sided = TRUE)
      
    perf_a[nrow(perf_a)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], q_grid[qq], "IHW_x1", p8_1[[4]], p8_1[[1]], p8_1[[2]])
  }
  
  # Second x
  for (qq in seq_along(q_grid)) {
    res_ihw_2 <- ihw(pvalues = p, covariates = X[,2], alpha = q_grid[qq], nbins = 5)
    p8_2 <- performance(gt, which(adj_pvalues(res_ihw_2) <= q_grid[qq]), z = z, bh_level = q_grid[qq], one.sided = FALSE)
      
    perf_a[nrow(perf_a)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], q_grid[qq], "IHW_x2", p8_2[[4]], p8_2[[1]], p8_2[[2]])
  }

  results_list[[length(results_list)+1]] <- perf_a

}

# Combine and calculate average
results_all <- bind_rows(results_list)

results_all <- results_all %>%
  mutate(
    Selected = as.numeric(Selected),
    FDP      = as.numeric(FDP),
    Power    = as.numeric(Power)
  )

# If Selected==0，FDP/Power set to be NA
results_all <- results_all %>%
  mutate(
    FDP   = ifelse(Selected == 0, NA_real_, FDP),
    Power = ifelse(Selected == 0, NA_real_, Power)
  )

## Group_by a and q
summary_by_aq <- results_all %>%
  group_by(Method, q) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_Selected = mean(Selected, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_FDP      = mean(FDP, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_Power    = mean(Power, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

summary_by_aq %>% filter(q == 0.05)

# saveRDS(results_all_x_05 , "C:/Users/zwang26/OneDrive - UTHealth Houston/conditionalGaussian/chai_env/simX_all_results_05.rds")

# saveRDS(summary_results_x_05, "C:/Users/zwang26/OneDrive - UTHealth Houston/conditionalGaussian/chai_env/simX_summary_05.rds")
```

## IHW 
```{r}
set.seed(1)
# library(splines)
# library(OrderShapeEM)
# Load your custom functions:
# source("conditionalGaussianlFDR_null_z_autoK.R")
# source("performance.R")
# source("adapt_glm.R")
# source("adapt_gmm.R")
# source("yushu.R")

# Initialize
seeds <- sample(1:10000, 99)
seeds <- c(seeds, 123)
results_ihw <- list()


q_grid <- seq(0.06, 0.10, by = 0.01)
  
for (s in seq_along(seeds)) {
  set.seed(seeds[s])

  n = 1000
  n0 <- 950
  n1 <- 25

  z0 <- rnorm(n0, mean = 0, sd = 1)
  x0 <- rnorm(n0, mean = 5, sd = 1)
  y0 <- rnorm(n0, mean = 1, sd = 1)
  
  z1 <- rnorm(n1, mean = 2, sd = 0.5)
  x1 <- rnorm(n1, mean = 4, sd = 1)
  y1 <- rnorm(n1, mean = 2, sd = 1)
  
  z2 <- rnorm(n1, mean = 3, sd = 0.5)
  x2 <- rnorm(n1, mean = 3, sd = 1)
  y2 <- rnorm(n1, mean = 3, sd = 1)
  
  z <- c(z0, z1, z2)
  x <- c(x0, x1, x2)
  y <- c(y0, y1, y2)
  
  X <- cbind(x, y)

  gt <- seq((n0+1), n) # Ground truth for alternative

  # Common values
  x_df <- data.frame(X)
  # formula_ns <- list("~ns(x, df = 2) + ns(y, df = 2)", 
  #                    "~ns(x, df = 4) + ns(y, df = 4)",
  #                    "~ns(x, df = 6) + ns(y, df = 6)")
  p <- pnorm(z, lower.tail = FALSE)
  # p <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(z)))

  # Apply models and collect performance
  perf_a <- data.frame(
    Seed    = integer(),
    q       = numeric(),
    Method  = character(),
    Selected  = numeric(),
    FDP       = numeric(),
    Power     = numeric(),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  # 6. IHW
  # First x
  for (qq in seq_along(q_grid)) {
    res_ihw_1 <- ihw(pvalues = p, covariates = X[,1], alpha = q_grid[qq], nbins = 5)
    p8_1 <- performance(gt, which(adj_pvalues(res_ihw_1) <= q_grid[qq]), z = z, bh_level = q_grid[qq], one.sided = TRUE)
      
    perf_a[nrow(perf_a)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], q_grid[qq], "IHW_x1", p8_1[[4]], p8_1[[1]], p8_1[[2]])
  }
  
  # Second x
  for (qq in seq_along(q_grid)) {
    res_ihw_2 <- ihw(pvalues = p, covariates = X[,2], alpha = q_grid[qq], nbins = 5)
    p8_2 <- performance(gt, which(adj_pvalues(res_ihw_2) <= q_grid[qq]), z = z, bh_level = q_grid[qq], one.sided = FALSE)
      
    perf_a[nrow(perf_a)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], q_grid[qq], "IHW_x2", p8_2[[4]], p8_2[[1]], p8_2[[2]])
  }

  results_ihw[[length(results_ihw)+1]] <- perf_a

}

results_ihw_q_06_1 <- results_ihw

# Combine and calculate average
results_ihw_diff_q_06_1 <- dplyr::bind_rows(results_ihw_q_06_1) |>
  mutate(
    Selected = as.numeric(Selected),
    FDP      = as.numeric(FDP),
    Power    = as.numeric(Power),
    FDP      = ifelse(Selected == 0, NA_real_, FDP),
    Power    = ifelse(Selected == 0, NA_real_, Power)
  )

results_ihw_diff_q <- rbind(results_ihw_diff_q_01_05, results_ihw_diff_q_06_1)


results_all_wt_ihw <- rbind(results_all, results_ihw_diff_q)


## Group_by a and q
summary_results_with_ihw <- results_all_wt_ihw %>%
  group_by(Method, q) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_Selected = mean(Selected, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_FDP      = mean(FDP, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_Power    = mean(Power, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

summary_results_with_ihw %>% filter(q == 0.05)

# saveRDS(results_all_wt_ihw, "C:/Users/zwang26/OneDrive - UTHealth Houston/conditionalGaussian/chai_env/simX_all_results_diff_q.rds")

# saveRDS(summary_results_with_ihw, "C:/Users/zwang26/OneDrive - UTHealth Houston/conditionalGaussian/chai_env/simX_summary_diff_q.rds")
```


### Change NA in FDP and power to 0
```{r}
library(dplyr)

results_0 <- results_all %>%
  mutate(
    FDP   = ifelse(Selected == 0 & is.na(FDP), 0, FDP),
    Power = ifelse(Selected == 0 & is.na(Power), 0, Power)
  )

summary_0 <- results_0 %>%
  group_by(Method, q) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_Selected = mean(Selected),
    mean_FDP      = mean(FDP),
    mean_Power    = mean(Power),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

summary_0 %>% filter(q == 0.05)


# saveRDS(results_0, "C:/Users/zwang26/OneDrive - UTHealth Houston/conditionalGaussian/chai_env/simX_all_results_with_zero.rds")
# 
# saveRDS(summary_0, "C:/Users/zwang26/OneDrive - UTHealth Houston/conditionalGaussian/chai_env/simX_summary_with_zero.rds")
```



<!-- # Repeating, 10 replicates, different q -->
<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- set.seed(1) -->
<!-- library(splines) -->
<!-- library(dplyr) -->
<!-- library(ggplot2) -->
<!-- require(OrderShapeEM) -->
<!-- library(IHW) -->


<!-- # Initialize -->
<!-- seeds <- sample(1:10000, 9) -->
<!-- seeds <- c(seeds, 123) -->

<!-- q_grid <- seq(0.05, 0.1, by = 0.01) -->
<!-- results_list <- list() -->


<!-- for (s in seq_along(seeds)) { -->
<!--   set.seed(seeds[s]) -->

<!--   n = 1000 -->
<!--   n0 <- 950 -->
<!--   n1 <- 25 -->

<!--   z0 <- rnorm(n0, mean = 0, sd = 1) -->
<!--   x0 <- rnorm(n0, mean = 5, sd = 1) -->
<!--   y0 <- rnorm(n0, mean = 1, sd = 1) -->

<!--   z1 <- rnorm(n1, mean = 2, sd = 0.5) -->
<!--   x1 <- rnorm(n1, mean = 4, sd = 1) -->
<!--   y1 <- rnorm(n1, mean = 2, sd = 1) -->

<!--   z2 <- rnorm(n1, mean = 3, sd = 0.5) -->
<!--   x2 <- rnorm(n1, mean = 3, sd = 1) -->
<!--   y2 <- rnorm(n1, mean = 3, sd = 1) -->

<!--   z <- c(z0, z1, z2) -->
<!--   x <- c(x0, x1, x2) -->
<!--   y <- c(y0, y1, y2) -->

<!--   X <- cbind(x, y) -->

<!--   gt <- seq((n0+1), n) # Ground truth for alternative -->

<!--   # Common values -->
<!--   x_df <- data.frame(X) -->
<!--   formula_ns <- list("~ns(x, df = 4)", "~ns(y, df = 4)",  -->
<!--                      "~ns(x, df = 6)", "~ns(y, df = 6)", -->
<!--                      "~ns(x, df = 2) + ns(y, df = 2)",  -->
<!--                      "~ns(x, df = 4) + ns(y, df = 4)",  -->
<!--                      "~ns(x, df = 6) + ns(y, df = 6)") -->

<!--   p <- pnorm(z, lower.tail = FALSE) -->
<!--   # p <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(z))) -->

<!--   # Apply models and collect performance -->
<!--   perf <- data.frame( -->
<!--         Seed = integer(), -->
<!--         q    = numeric(), -->
<!--         Method   = character(), -->
<!--         Selected = numeric(), -->
<!--         FDP      = numeric(), -->
<!--         Power    = numeric(), -->
<!--         stringsAsFactors = FALSE -->
<!--       ) -->

<!--   # 2. CHAI -->
<!--   res_chai <- chai(z, X, M = 100) -->

<!--   for (qq in seq_along(q_grid)) { -->
<!--       select <- lFDRselect(res_chai, q = q_grid[qq]) -->
<!--       p2  <- performance(gt, select, z = res_chai$z, -->
<!--                          bh_level = q_grid[qq], one.sided = TRUE) -->
<!--       # chai -->
<!--       perf[nrow(perf)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], q_grid[qq], "chai", p2[[4]], p2[[1]], p2[[2]]) -->
<!--       # BH -->
<!--       perf[nrow(perf)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], q_grid[qq], "BH",   p2[[13]], p2[[8]], p2[[9]]) -->
<!--     } -->


<!--   # 3. adapt_gmm_z -->
<!--   res_gmm_z <- adapt_gmm(x_df, z = z, alphas = q_grid, beta_formulas = formula_ns, testing = "one_sided") -->

<!--   for (qq in seq_along(q_grid)) { -->
<!--       # idx <- match(qq, alphas)  # 0.05 -> 5, 0.06 -> 6, ..., 0.10 -> 10 -->
<!--       p3  <- performance(gt, res_gmm_z$rejs[[qq]], z = z, -->
<!--                          bh_level = q_grid[qq], one.sided = TRUE) -->
<!--       perf[nrow(perf)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], q_grid[qq], "adapt_gmm_z", p3[[4]], p3[[1]], p3[[2]]) -->
<!--     } -->

<!--   # 4. adapt_gmm_p -->
<!--   res_gmm_p <- adapt_gmm(x_df, pvals = p, alphas = q_grid, beta_formulas = formula_ns, testing = "one_sided") -->
<!--   for (qq in seq_along(q_grid)) { -->
<!--       # idx <- match(qq, alphas) -->
<!--       p4  <- performance(gt, res_gmm_p$rejs[[qq]], z = z, -->
<!--                          bh_level = q_grid[qq], one.sided = TRUE) -->
<!--       perf[nrow(perf)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], q_grid[qq], "adapt_gmm_p", p4[[4]], p4[[1]], p4[[2]]) -->
<!--     } -->

<!--   # 5. adapt_glm -->
<!--   res_glm <- adapt_glm(x_df, pvals = p, alphas = q_grid, pi_formulas = formula_ns, mu_formulas = formula_ns) -->

<!--   empty <- is.null(res_glm) || (!is.list(res_glm$rejs)) -->
<!--   for (qq in seq_along(q_grid)) { -->
<!--     if (!empty && lengths(res_glm$rejs)[qq] > 0L){ -->
<!--      p5 <- performance(gt, res_glm$rejs[[qq]], z = z, -->
<!--                         bh_level = q_grid[qq], one.sided = TRUE) -->
<!--      perf[nrow(perf)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], q_grid[qq], "adapt_glm", p5[[4]], p5[[1]], p5[[2]]) -->

<!--     } else { -->
<!--       perf[nrow(perf)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], q_grid[qq], "adapt_glm", 0, NA, NA) -->
<!--     } -->
<!--   } -->

<!--   # 6. OrderShapeEM -->
<!--   # First x -->
<!--   tryCatch({ -->
<!--     res_osem <- OrderShapeEM(pvals = p, order.var = X[,1], OrderShapeEM.control(trace = TRUE)) -->

<!--     for (qq in seq_along(q_grid)) { -->
<!--         p6 <- performance(gt, which(res_osem$fdr <= q_grid[qq]), z = z, -->
<!--                           bh_level = q_grid[qq], one.sided = TRUE) -->
<!--         perf[nrow(perf)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], q_grid[qq], "OrderShapeEM_x1", p6[[4]], p6[[1]], p6[[2]]) -->
<!--       } -->
<!--     }, error = function(e) { -->
<!--       message(paste("OrderShapeEM failed at seed", seeds[s], ":", e$message)) -->
<!--       for (qq in seq_along(q_grid)) { -->
<!--         perf[nrow(perf)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], q_grid[qq], "OrderShapeEM_x1", NA, NA, NA) -->
<!--       } -->
<!--     }) -->



<!--   # Second x -->
<!--   tryCatch({ -->
<!--     res_osem <- OrderShapeEM(pvals = p, order.var = X[,2], OrderShapeEM.control(trace = TRUE)) -->

<!--     for (qq in seq_along(q_grid)) { -->
<!--         p6 <- performance(gt, which(res_osem$fdr <= q_grid[qq]), z = z, -->
<!--                           bh_level = q_grid[qq], one.sided = TRUE) -->
<!--         perf[nrow(perf)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], q_grid[qq], "OrderShapeEM_x2", p6[[4]], p6[[1]], p6[[2]]) -->
<!--       } -->
<!--     }, error = function(e) { -->
<!--       message(paste("OrderShapeEM failed at seed", seeds[s], ":", e$message)) -->
<!--       for (qq in seq_along(q_grid)) { -->
<!--         perf[nrow(perf)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], q_grid[qq], "OrderShapeEM_x2", NA, NA, NA) -->
<!--       } -->
<!--     }) -->

<!--   # 7. FDRreg -->
<!--   res_fdrreg <- FDRreg(z, X, nulltype = "theoretical") -->
<!--   for (qq in seq_along(q_grid)) { -->
<!--     p7 <- performance(gt, which(res_fdrreg$FDR <= q_grid[qq]), z = z, -->
<!--                       bh_level = q_grid[qq], one.sided = TRUE) -->
<!--     perf[nrow(perf)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], q_grid[qq], "FDRreg", p7[[4]], p7[[1]], p7[[2]]) -->
<!--   } -->

<!--   # 8. IHW -->
<!--   # First x -->
<!--   for (qq in seq_along(q_grid)) { -->
<!--     res_ihw_1 <- ihw(pvalues = p, covariates = X[,1], alpha = q_grid[qq], nbins = 5) -->
<!--     p8_1 <- performance(gt, which(adj_pvalues(res_ihw_1) <= q_grid[qq]), z = z, bh_level = q_grid[qq], one.sided = TRUE) -->

<!--     perf[nrow(perf)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], q_grid[qq], "IHW_x1", p8_1[[4]], p8_1[[1]], p8_1[[2]]) -->
<!--   } -->


<!--   # Second x -->
<!--   for (qq in seq_along(q_grid)) { -->
<!--     res_ihw_2 <- ihw(pvalues = p, covariates = X[,2], alpha = q_grid[qq], nbins = 5) -->
<!--     p8_2 <- performance(gt, which(adj_pvalues(res_ihw_2) <= q_grid[qq]), z = z, bh_level = q_grid[qq], one.sided = TRUE) -->

<!--     perf[nrow(perf)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], q_grid[qq], "IHW_x2", p8_2[[4]], p8_2[[1]], p8_2[[2]]) -->
<!--   } -->

<!--   # Get the results -->
<!--   results_list[[length(results_list)+1]] <- perf -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- # Combine and calculate average -->
<!-- results_diff_q <- dplyr::bind_rows(results_list) -->

<!-- results_diff_q <- results_diff_q %>% -->
<!--   mutate( -->
<!--     Selected = as.numeric(Selected), -->
<!--     FDP      = as.numeric(FDP), -->
<!--     Power    = as.numeric(Power) -->
<!--   ) -->

<!-- # If Selected==0，FDP/Power set to be NA -->
<!-- results_diff_q <- results_diff_q %>% -->
<!--   mutate( -->
<!--     FDP   = ifelse(Selected == 0, NA_real_, FDP), -->
<!--     Power = ifelse(Selected == 0, NA_real_, Power) -->
<!--   ) -->

<!-- summary_X_by_q <- results_diff_q %>% -->
<!--   group_by(Method, q) %>% -->
<!--   summarise( -->
<!--     mean_Selected = mean(Selected, na.rm = TRUE), -->
<!--     mean_FDP      = mean(FDP, na.rm = TRUE), -->
<!--     mean_Power    = mean(Power, na.rm = TRUE), -->
<!--     .groups = "drop" -->
<!--   ) -->


<!-- print(summary_X_by_q) -->
<!-- summary_X_by_q %>% filter(q == 0.05) -->

<!-- # saveRDS(results_diff_q , "C:/Users/zwang26/OneDrive - UTHealth Houston/conditionalGaussian/chai_env/simX_all_results_diff_q.rds") -->
<!-- #  -->
<!-- # saveRDS(summary_X_by_q, "C:/Users/zwang26/OneDrive - UTHealth Houston/conditionalGaussian/chai_env/simX_summary_diff_q.rds") -->
<!-- ``` -->





# pre-processing for Plots

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

order <- c("chai", "adapt_glm", "adapt_gmm_z", "adapt_gmm_p", 
           "FDRreg", "OrderShapeEM_x1", "OrderShapeEM_x2", 
           "IHW_x1", "IHW_x2", "BH")

summary_X_by_q <- summary_0
summary_X_by_q$Method <- factor(summary_X_by_q$Method, levels = order)


###########################################################
# Plots
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)

simX_long <- summary_X_by_q %>%
  mutate(
    mean_FDP   = ifelse(is.nan(mean_FDP), NA, mean_FDP),
    mean_Power = ifelse(is.nan(mean_Power), NA, mean_Power)
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(mean_FDP, mean_Power),
               names_to = "Metric", values_to = "Value") %>%
  mutate(Metric = recode(Metric,
                         mean_FDP = "FDP",
                         mean_Power = "Power"))
```

# Consistant color plot

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)

# ---------- color helpers ----------
blend_color <- function(col, target = "white", amount = 0.4) {
  a <- grDevices::col2rgb(col) / 255
  b <- grDevices::col2rgb(target) / 255
  out <- (1 - amount) * a + amount * b
  grDevices::rgb(out[1,], out[2,], out[3,])
}

variant_shades <- function(base_col, K = 12) {
  grDevices::colorRampPalette(c(
    blend_color(base_col, "white", 0.55),
    base_col,
    blend_color(base_col, "black", 0.25)
  ))(K)
}

make_method_palette <- function(methods, K = 12) {
  fixed <- c(
    chai        = "red",
    adapt_glm   = "#FF7F0E",
    adapt_gmm_z = "#2CA02C",
    adapt_gmm_p = "#9467BD",
    FDRreg      = "#8C564B",
    BH          = "black"
  )

  family_base <- c(
    OrderShapeEM = "#1F77B4",  # blue family
    IHW          = "#17BECF"   # teal family
  )

  ord_shades <- variant_shades(family_base["OrderShapeEM"], K = K)
  ihw_shades <- variant_shades(family_base["IHW"],          K = K)

  methods <- unique(as.character(methods))
  pal <- setNames(rep("#7F7F7F", length(methods)), methods)  # fallback grey

  for (m in methods) {
    if (m %in% names(fixed)) {
      pal[m] <- fixed[m]
      next
    }

    base <- sub("_x\\d+$", "", m)
    idx  <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(sub(".*_x", "", m)))

    if (base %in% names(family_base)) {
      if (is.na(idx)) {
        pal[m] <- family_base[base]  # e.g. "OrderShapeEM" with no suffix
      } else {
        idx <- max(1L, min(idx, K))
        pal[m] <- if (base == "OrderShapeEM") ord_shades[idx] else ihw_shades[idx]
      }
    }
  }

  pal
}

method_order <- function(methods) {
  methods <- unique(as.character(methods))
  core <- c("chai","adapt_glm","adapt_gmm_z","adapt_gmm_p","FDRreg")

  sort_family <- function(base) {
    fam <- methods[grepl(paste0("^", base, "(_x\\d+)?$"), methods)]
    base_present <- base %in% fam
    vars <- fam[grepl("_x\\d+$", fam)]
    if (length(vars)) {
      idx <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(sub(".*_x", "", vars)))
      vars <- vars[order(idx)]
    }
    c(if (base_present) base else character(0), vars)
  }

  out <- c(core, sort_family("OrderShapeEM"), sort_family("IHW"), "BH")
  out <- unique(out)
  out[out %in% methods]
}

# ---------- plotting function (labels, no legend) ----------
library(ggrepel)
library(stringr)

plot_metric <- function(long_table, metric_name, ylab, title, K_variants = 12, fdp_y = 0.2){
  dat <- dplyr::filter(long_table, Metric == metric_name) %>%
    mutate(Method = as.character(Method))

  ord <- method_order(dat$Method)
  dat <- dat %>% mutate(Method = factor(Method, levels = ord))
  pal <- make_method_palette(levels(dat$Method), K = K_variants)

  # endpoints for labels
  endpoints <- dat %>%
    group_by(Method) %>%
    filter(q == max(q, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    slice_tail(n = 1) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(
      # option A: wrap long names
      label = as.character(Method)
      # label = str_wrap(label, width = 12)
    )

  x_rng <- range(dat$q, na.rm = TRUE)
  x_nudge <- diff(x_rng) * 0.03  # more room to the right

  p <- ggplot(dat, aes(x = q, y = Value, group = Method, color = Method)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 0.9, na.rm = TRUE) +
    geom_point(size = 1.6, na.rm = TRUE) +

    # repel labels to avoid overlap
    ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
      data = endpoints,
      aes(label = label),
      nudge_x = x_nudge,
      hjust = 0,
      direction = "y",
      box.padding = 0.25,
      point.padding = 0.15,
      segment.size = 0.25,
      min.segment.length = 0,
      max.overlaps = Inf,
      seed = 1,
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +

    scale_color_manual(values = pal, breaks = ord) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = seq(0.01, 0.10, 0.01),
      expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.18))  # add right padding for labels
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(
      ylim = c(0, 1),
      clip = "off"   # <-- critical: do not clip labels
    ) +
    labs(x = "q level", y = ylab, title = title) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "none",
      plot.margin = margin(5.5, 60, 5.5, 5.5)  # <-- more right margin
    )

  if (metric_name == "FDP") {
    p <- p +
      geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1.2) +
      coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, fdp_y))
  }

  p
}


p_fdp   <- plot_metric(simX_long, "FDP", "Mean FDP", "FDP vs q", fdp_y = 0.12)
p_power <- plot_metric(simX_long, "Power", "Mean Power", "Power vs q")

library(patchwork)
combo <- p_fdp + p_power + plot_annotation(title = "Method Performance vs q")
combo

# ggsave("C:/Users/zwang26/OneDrive - UTHealth Houston/conditionalGaussian/plots/Simulations/SimX_fdr_power_updated_zero.png", plot = combo, width = 14, height = 5, dpi = 300)

```
